body.text: End-of-day Friday: House Judiciary “ghost gun” hearing has wrapped, SCOTUS conference concluded with orders Monday, H.R. 38 aftermath continues into the weekend cycle

Three storylines closed out the day. The House Judiciary “ghost gun” oversight hearing wrapped this afternoon; the announced witness panel (ATF Acting Deputy Director, FBI lab supervisor, two state AGs, FPC litigation director) covered enforcement data since the 2022 final rul...
